body:
This PR updates the thermo benchmark script by adding a single field broadcast benchmark, to compare against the thermo assignment.

The additional benchmark also includes a single field within multiple fields, to see if/how much we pay for field offsets.
title: Update thermo benchmark script

body:
This PR adds an offset benchmark.

Results from this benchmark suggest that #1922 should be sufficient (from this benchmark, only a 3% difference from SOL), and we shouldn't actually need #1925, which is good news.
title: Add offset benchmark
